compiled_state.title: Add orchestration.max_agents config key to dso-config.conf with documentation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add the orchestration.max_agents config key to dso-config.conf as a commented example with documentation of valid values.

### Files to modify
- .claude/dso-config.conf

### Implementation details
Add a commented section:
```
# orchestration.max_agents — caps the upper bound on concurrent sub-agents.
# When unset and usage verdict is unlimited, MAX_AGENTS: unlimited is emitted.
# Valid values: positive integer (e.g., 3, 5, 10) or omit for no cap.
# orchestration.max_agents=5
```

### Unit test exemption justification
1. No conditional logic — purely a config comment/example
2. Any test would be a change-detector (grep for comment text)
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — config file wiring

## File Impact
- .claude/dso-config.conf (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] dso-config.conf contains orchestration.max_agents documentation
  Verify: grep -q "orchestration.max_agents" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Config key is commented out by default
  Verify: grep -q "# orchestration.max_agents=" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Added orchestration.max_agents config key to .claude/dso-config.conf as commented-out section with documentation. AC1 (contains orchestration.max_agents documentation): PASS. AC2 (config key commented out by default): PASS. Placed after debug.intent_search_budget block.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Config key added. Commit 223248d1.
comments.author: Test
